svg.title: Synalux POS — discounts
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for discounts. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Happy hour | Coupons | BOGO | % off | $ off | Auto promos -- stored in pos_discounts
Mon-Fri 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM | Alcohol category | Auto-applies
Tuesday only | Wings SKU: APP-010 | Manual apply
All items | Requires manager PIN | Manual
Auto-applies to loyalty members | Entree category

g.text: All items | Mon-Thu before 5 PM | Manual

svg.text: Revenue center: All | Override: manager PIN not required
Time-window discounts auto-apply at register when current time falls within window.
Cashier sees amber banner "Happy Hour Active -- 20% off drinks applied" on order ticket.
Reports: discount_report RPC tracks savings amount, items discounted, revenue center split.
All discount logic server-side -- no hardcoded rules in POS client.
Synalux POS | Discounts | pos_discounts -- time-window / coupon / BOGO / auto | RBAC role gate -- no hardcodes
